passage_title: Sustainable architecture - lessons from the ant

sentences.sentence: Africa owes its termite mounds a lot.
sentences.translation: 非洲在许多方面都得益于白蚁丘。

structure.text: Africa
owes
its termite mounds
a lot

difficult_points: owe A a lot 表示从A处获益良多，而非字面欠债。
its 表示这些白蚁丘位于非洲。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在很大程度上得益于某事物

sentences.sentence: Trees and shrubs take root in them.
sentences.translation: 树木和灌木在蚁丘中扎根。

structure.text: Trees and shrubs
take root
in them

difficult_points: them 指 termite mounds。
take root 既表示植物扎根，也可比喻观念扎根，此处为本义。

sentences.sentence: Prospectors mine them, looking for specks of gold carried up by termites from hundreds of metres below.
sentences.translation: 勘探者开挖蚁丘，寻找白蚁从地下数百米处带上来的点点黄金。

structure.text: Prospectors mine them
looking for specks of gold
carried up by termites from hundreds of metres below

difficult_points: looking... 的逻辑主语是 Prospectors，说明开挖目的。
carried up... 修饰 gold，说明金屑如何到达蚁丘。

sentences.sentence: And of course, they are a special treat to aardvarks and other insectivores.
sentences.translation: 当然，它们还是土豚和其他食虫动物的一顿美餐。

structure.text: And of course
they
are a special treat
to aardvarks and other insectivores

difficult_points: they 仍指 termite mounds，更确切说其中的白蚁。
a special treat 表示难得而可口的食物。

sentences.sentence: Now, Africa is paying an offbeat tribute to these towers of mud.
sentences.translation: 如今，非洲正以一种不同寻常的方式向这些泥塔致敬。

structure.text: Now
Africa
is paying an offbeat tribute
to these towers of mud

difficult_points: these towers of mud 比喻白蚁丘。
offbeat 表示这种致敬方式不落俗套，即在建筑中仿生。

sentences.sentence: The extraordinary Eastgate Building in Harare, Zimbabwe's capital city, is said to be the only one in the world to use the same cooling and heating principles as the termite mound.
sentences.translation: 位于津巴布韦首都哈拉雷的非凡建筑东门中心，据说是世界上唯一采用与白蚁丘相同冷热调节原理的建筑。

structure.text: The extraordinary Eastgate Building in Harare
Zimbabwe's capital city
is said to be the only one in the world
to use the same cooling and heating principles as the termite mound

difficult_points: Zimbabwe's capital city 与 Harare 同位。
is said to... 是传闻式被动；the same... as... 表示相同原理。

sentences.sentence: Termites in Zimbabwe build gigantic mounds inside which they farm a fungus that is their primary food source.
sentences.translation: 津巴布韦的白蚁建造巨大蚁丘，并在其内部培育一种作为主要食物来源的真菌。

structure.text: Termites in Zimbabwe build gigantic mounds
inside which they farm a fungus
that is their primary food source

difficult_points: inside which 修饰 mounds，介词 inside 前置。
that 修饰 fungus，说明真菌对白蚁的用途。

sentences.sentence: This must be kept at exactly 30.5°C, while the temperatures on the African veld outside can range from 1.5°C at night only just above freezing to a baking hot 40°C during the day.
sentences.translation: 这种真菌必须维持在恰好30.5°C，而外面的非洲草原气温可从夜间仅略高于冰点的1.5°C升至白天酷热的40°C。

structure.text: This must be kept at exactly 30.5°C
while the temperatures on the African veld outside can range from 1.5°C at night only just above freezing to a baking hot 40°C during the day

difficult_points: This 指 fungus，must be kept 是情态被动。
range from... to... 给出昼夜温差，while 表示对比。

sentences.sentence: The termites achieve this remarkable feat by building a system of vents in the mound.
sentences.translation: 白蚁通过在蚁丘内建造一套通风口系统完成这一惊人壮举。

structure.text: The termites
achieve this remarkable feat
by building a system of vents in the mound

difficult_points: this remarkable feat 指在外界温差巨大时保持真菌恒温。
by 后动名词说明实现这一成果的方法。

sentences.sentence: Those at the base lead down into chambers cooled by wet mud carried up from water tables far below, and others lead up through a flue to the peak of the mound.
sentences.translation: 底部的通风口向下通往由湿泥冷却的腔室，这些湿泥来自地下深处的水位层；其他通风口则经烟道向上通到蚁丘顶部。

structure.text: Those at the base lead down into chambers
cooled by wet mud carried up from water tables far below
and others lead up through a flue to the peak of the mound

difficult_points: Those 与 others 都替代 vents。
cooled... 修饰 chambers，其中 carried up... 又修饰 wet mud。

sentences.sentence: By constantly opening and closing these heating and cooling vents over the course of the day the termites succeed in keeping the temperature constant in spite of the wide fluctuations outside.
sentences.translation: 白蚁在一天中不断开合这些冷热调节通风口，从而在外界温度大幅波动的情况下成功保持内部恒温。

structure.text: By constantly opening and closing these heating and cooling vents over the course of the day
the termites
succeed in keeping the temperature constant
in spite of the wide fluctuations outside

difficult_points: By... opening and closing 说明方法，两个动名词并列。
keeping the temperature constant 是 keep＋宾语＋形容词补语。

expressions.text: over the course of the day

sentences.sentence: Architect Mick Pearce used precisely the same strategy when designing the Eastgate Building, which has no air conditioning and virtually no heating.
sentences.translation: 建筑师米克·皮尔斯设计东门中心时采用了完全相同的策略；该建筑没有空调，暖气也几乎没有。

structure.text: Architect Mick Pearce used precisely the same strategy
when designing the Eastgate Building
which has no air conditioning and virtually no heating

difficult_points: when designing 省略了主语 Mick Pearce 和 was。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，修饰 Eastgate Building。

sentences.sentence: The building the country's largest commercial and shopping complex uses less than 10% of the energy of a conventional building ns size.
sentences.translation: 这座全国最大的商业购物综合体所耗能源，不到同等规模传统建筑的10%。

structure.text: The building
the country's largest commercial and shopping complex
uses less than 10% of the energy of a conventional building ns size

difficult_points: the country's... 是 building 的同位语，原文未用逗号隔开。
ns size 应为 of its size 一类表达的源文异常，需照录；比较对象是同等规模建筑。

sentences.sentence: These efficiencies translated directly to the bottom line: the Eastgate's owners saved $3.5 million on a $36 million building because an air- conditioning plant didn't have to be imported.
sentences.translation: 这些节能效果直接转化为经济收益：由于不必进口空调设备，东门中心的业主在这座耗资3600万美元的建筑上节省了350万美元。

structure.text: These efficiencies translated directly to the bottom line
the Eastgate's owners saved $3.5 million on a $36 million building
because an air- conditioning plant didn't have to be imported

difficult_points: 冒号后用具体节省金额解释 bottom line。
didn't have to be imported 是被动结构；原文 air- conditioning 的连字符前有空格。

sentences.sentence: These savings were also passed on to tenants: rents are 20% lower than in a new building next door.
sentences.translation: 这些节省也惠及租户：这里的租金比隔壁新楼低20%。

structure.text: These savings were also passed on to tenants
rents are 20% lower than in a new building next door

difficult_points: pass on savings to 表示把成本节省形成的利益转给租户。
冒号后的比较句具体说明租户获得的好处。

sentences.sentence: The complex is actually two buildings linked by bridges across a shady, glass-roofed atrium open to the breezes.
sentences.translation: 这座综合体实际上由两栋建筑构成，两者以横跨阴凉玻璃顶中庭的桥梁相连，中庭向微风敞开。

structure.text: The complex is actually two buildings
linked by bridges across a shady, glass-roofed atrium
open to the breezes

difficult_points: linked... 修饰 two buildings，表示建筑之间的连接方式。
open to the breezes 后置修饰 atrium。

sentences.sentence: Fans suck fresh air in from the atrium, blow it upstairs through hollow spaces under the floors and from there into each office through baseboard vents.
sentences.translation: 风扇从中庭吸入新鲜空气，经地板下的中空空间把空气吹到楼上，再从那里通过踢脚板通风口送进各间办公室。

structure.text: Fans
suck fresh air in from the atrium
blow it upstairs through hollow spaces under the floors
and from there into each office through baseboard vents

difficult_points: suck 与 blow 共享主语 Fans；it 指 fresh air。
and 后省略重复的 blow it，保留两段气流路线。

sentences.sentence: As it rises and warms, it is drawn out via ceiling vents and finally exits through forty- eight brick chimneys.
sentences.translation: 空气上升并变暖后，经天花板通风口被抽出，最后从四十八座砖烟囱排出。

structure.text: As it rises and warms
it is drawn out via ceiling vents
and finally exits through forty- eight brick chimneys

difficult_points: 两个 it 都指流动的 air；As 表示随空气上升变暖。
is drawn 与 exits 由 and 连接；原文 forty- eight 的连字符前有空格。

sentences.sentence: To keep the harsh, highveld sun from heating the interior, no more than 25% of the outside is glass, and all the windows are screened by cement arches that just out more than a metre.
sentences.translation: 为防止高原强烈阳光加热室内，建筑外立面玻璃占比不超过25%，所有窗户还由向外伸出一米多的水泥拱遮挡。

structure.text: To keep the harsh, highveld sun from heating the interior
no more than 25% of the outside is glass
and all the windows are screened by cement arches
that just out more than a metre

difficult_points: keep A from doing 表示阻止阳光加热内部。
that 修饰 arches；原文 just out 疑为 jut out 的拼写异常，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: During summer's cool nights, big fans flush air through the building seven times an hour to chill the hollow floors.
sentences.translation: 夏季凉爽的夜间，大风扇每小时让空气穿过建筑七次，以冷却中空地板。

structure.text: During summer's cool nights
big fans flush air through the building seven times an hour
to chill the hollow floors

difficult_points: flush air through 表示让大量空气快速穿流。
to chill... 是目的状语，说明夜间换气的作用。

sentences.sentence: By day, smaller fans blow two changes of air an hour through the building, to circulate the air which has been in contact with the cool floors.
sentences.translation: 白天，小风扇每小时让建筑换气两次，使接触过凉爽地板的空气循环起来。

structure.text: By day
smaller fans blow two changes of air an hour through the building
to circulate the air
which has been in contact with the cool floors

difficult_points: two changes of air an hour 表示每小时完整换气两次。
which 修饰 air，has been in contact with 表示此前与冷地板接触。

sentences.sentence: For winter days, there are small heaters in the vents.
sentences.translation: 冬季白天，通风口中设有小型加热器。

structure.text: For winter days
there are
small heaters in the vents

difficult_points: there are 是存在句，真正信息中心是 small heaters。
in the vents 后置限定加热器的位置。

sentences.sentence: This is all possible only because Harare is 1600 feet above sea level, has cloudless skies, little humidity and rapid temperature swings days as warm as 31°C commonly drop to 14°C at night.'You couldn't do this in New York, with its fantastically hot summers and fantastically cold winters,' Pearce said.
sentences.translation: 这一切之所以可行，只因哈拉雷海拔1600英尺、天空少云、湿度低且昼夜温差变化快：白天可暖至31°C，夜间通常降到14°C。皮尔斯说：“纽约夏季酷热、冬季严寒，无法这样做。”

structure.text: This is all possible only because Harare is 1600 feet above sea level, has cloudless skies, little humidity and rapid temperature swings
days as warm as 31°C commonly drop to 14°C at night
'You couldn't do this in New York, with its fantastically hot summers and fantastically cold winters,' Pearce said

difficult_points: because 后 Harare 共享 is 与 has，列出当地气候条件。
原文 swings、days 与引语之间均缺常规标点或空格，验证要求整段照录，因此作为一个原文单元处理。

sentences.sentence: But then his eyes lit up at the challenge.' Perhaps you could store the summer's heat in water somehow.
sentences.translation: 但面对这个挑战，他随即眼睛一亮：“也许可以设法把夏季热量储存在水中。”

structure.text: But then his eyes lit up at the challenge
' Perhaps you could store the summer's heat in water somehow

difficult_points: his eyes lit up 是比喻表达，表示他因挑战而兴奋并有了灵感。
原文 challenge. 后直接接单引号且引语开头多一个空格，按原样保留。

sentences.sentence: The engineering firm of Ove Amp & Partners, which worked with him on the design, monitors daily temperatures outside, under the floors and at knee, desk and ceiling level.
sentences.translation: 参与设计的奥韦·安普合伙工程公司每日监测室外、地板下以及膝部、桌面和天花板高度的温度。

structure.text: The engineering firm of Ove Amp & Partners
which worked with him on the design
monitors daily temperatures
outside, under the floors and at knee, desk and ceiling level

difficult_points: which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充公司的设计合作关系。
outside、under... 与 at... 并列列出监测位置。

expressions.text: work with someone on the design

sentences.sentence: Ove Arup's graphs show that the temperature of the building has generally stayed between 23"C and 25°C.
sentences.translation: 奥韦·阿鲁普公司的图表显示，建筑温度通常保持在23°C至25°C之间。

structure.text: Ove Arup's graphs
show
that the temperature of the building has generally stayed between 23"C and 25°C

difficult_points: that 从句作 show 的宾语，has stayed 表示持续至今的状态。
原文 23"C 用双引号代替度数符号，是源文异常。

sentences.sentence: with the exception of the annual hot spell just before the summer rains in October, and three days in November, when a janitor accidentally switched off the fans at night.
sentences.translation: 例外是每年十月夏雨来临前的炎热期，以及十一月的一次三天异常——当时一名管理员夜间误关了风扇。

structure.text: with the exception of the annual hot spell just before the summer rains in October, and three days in November
when a janitor accidentally switched off the fans at night

difficult_points: 本句以小写 with 开头，是上一句被源文句点拆开的补充成分，必须独立照录。
when 修饰 three days in November，说明异常原因。

sentences.sentence: The atrium, which funnels the winds through, can be much cooler.
sentences.translation: 中庭能够引导风流穿过，因此温度可以低得多。

structure.text: The atrium
which funnels the winds through
can be much cooler

difficult_points: which 修饰 atrium，through 的逻辑宾语是关系代词 which。
much 修饰比较级 cooler，表示明显更凉。

sentences.sentence: And the air is fresh far more so than in air-conditioned buildings, where up to 30% of the air is recycled.
sentences.translation: 而且这里的空气更加新鲜，远胜于空调建筑；后者有多达30%的空气被循环使用。

structure.text: And the air is fresh
far more so than in air-conditioned buildings
where up to 30% of the air is recycled

difficult_points: so 替代 fresh，far more so 强化比较程度。
where 修饰 air-conditioned buildings，is recycled 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: Pearce, disdaining smooth glass skins as 'igloos in the Sahara', calls his building, with its exposed girders and pipes, 'spiky'.
sentences.translation: 皮尔斯把光滑玻璃幕墙鄙称为“撒哈拉沙漠里的冰屋”，并把自己这座梁架和管道外露的建筑称为“带刺的”。

structure.text: Pearce
disdaining smooth glass skins as 'igloos in the Sahara'
calls his building, with its exposed girders and pipes, 'spiky'
with its exposed girders and pipes

difficult_points: disdaining... 的逻辑主语是 Pearce，as 引出他对玻璃幕墙的比喻。
call A B 是宾语补足语结构；with... 插入修饰 building。

sentences.sentence: The design of the entrances is based on the porcupine-quill headdresses of the local Shona tribe.
sentences.translation: 入口设计取材于当地绍纳族的豪猪刺头饰。

structure.text: The design of the entrances
is based on
the porcupine-quill headdresses of the local Shona tribe

difficult_points: be based on 表示设计灵感或依据来自某物。
porcupine-quill 是复合定语，修饰 headdresses。

sentences.sentence: Elevators are designed to look like the mineshaft cages used in Zimbabwe's diamond mines.
sentences.translation: 电梯被设计成津巴布韦钻石矿井所用升降笼的样子。

structure.text: Elevators
are designed to look like
the mineshaft cages
used in Zimbabwe's diamond mines

difficult_points: are designed to look like 表示被设计为呈现某种外观。
used... 是过去分词短语，修饰 mineshaft cages。

sentences.sentence: The shape of the fan covers, and the stone used in their construction, are echoes of Great Zimbabwe, the ruins that give the country its name.
sentences.translation: 风扇罩的形状及其建造所用石材都呼应了大津巴布韦遗址——正是这片遗址赋予该国国名。

structure.text: The shape of the fan covers, and the stone used in their construction
are echoes of Great Zimbabwe
the ruins
that give the country its name

difficult_points: shape 与 stone 构成复合主语，故用 are；used... 修饰 stone。
the ruins 与 Great Zimbabwe 同位，that 修饰 ruins。

sentences.sentence: Standing on a roof catwalk, peering down inside at people as small as termites below.
sentences.translation: 站在屋顶检修通道上，向下望着里面如白蚁般渺小的人群。

structure.text: Standing on a roof catwalk
peering down inside at people as small as termites below

difficult_points: 本句是两个并列现在分词构成的源文残句，没有明示主句主语。
as small as termites 使用同级比较，描述从高处看去的人群。

sentences.sentence: Pearce said he hoped plants would grow wild in the atrium and pigeons and bats would move into it.
sentences.translation: 皮尔斯说，他希望植物能在中庭里自然繁茂，鸽子和蝙蝠也能迁入其中。

structure.text: Pearce said
he hoped
plants would grow wild in the atrium
and pigeons and bats would move into it

difficult_points: said 与 hoped 后都省略 that，形成嵌套宾语从句。
it 指 atrium；grow wild 表示不经人工约束地生长。

sentences.sentence: like that termite fungus, further extending the whole 'organic machine' metaphor.
sentences.translation: 就像那种白蚁真菌一样，从而进一步延伸整个“有机机器”的隐喻。

structure.text: like that termite fungus
further extending the whole 'organic machine' metaphor

difficult_points: 本句以小写 like 开头，是源文独立成句的残片，语义承接植物和动物迁入中庭。
extending 是结果性分词，表示这一生态景象会强化隐喻。

sentences.sentence: The architecture, he says, is a regionalised style that responds to the biosphere, to the ancient traditional stone architecture of Zimbabwe's past, and to local human resources.
sentences.translation: 他说，这座建筑体现了一种地域化风格，既回应生物圈，也回应津巴布韦古老的传统石构建筑和当地人力资源。

structure.text: The architecture
he says
is a regionalised style
that responds to the biosphere, to the ancient traditional stone architecture of Zimbabwe's past, and to local human resources

difficult_points: he says 是插入式报告分句，不影响主句 The architecture is...。
that 修饰 style，responds to 后并列三个对象。
